SQL Query: SELECT ((SELECT BuriedCarbonStock FROM BlueCarbonReservoirMatrix WHERE ReservoirTag = "Moreton Bay seagrass bank - Australia" AND BiotopeComplexity = "oligohaline Spartina alterniflora marsh mosaic with tidal creeks" AND DominantSedimentFacies = "anoxic silty organo-mud with fine lamination" AND MeasurementProtocol = "paired coring and radiocarbon AMS age-model triangulation") - (SELECT BuriedCarbonStock FROM BlueCarbonReservoirMatrix WHERE ReservoirTag = "Camargue brackish reedbed - France" AND BiotopeComplexity = "tidal flat microtopographic hummock-hollow complex" AND DominantSedimentFacies = "rhizome-bound cohesive peat with detrital woody fragments" AND MeasurementProtocol = "hyperspectral remote sensing for seagrass canopy cover mapping")) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT BuriedCarbonStock FROM BlueCarbonReservoirMatrix WHERE ReservoirTag = "Moreton Bay seagrass bank - Australia" AND BiotopeComplexity = "oligohaline Spartina alterniflora marsh mosaic with tidal creeks" AND DominantSedimentFacies = "anoxic silty organo-mud with fine lamination" AND MeasurementProtocol = "paired coring and radiocarbon AMS age-model triangulation"), 0) AS BuriedCarbonStock;
